creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Created attachment 251073
Patch to 8.2.3

Update to py-sabctools as newest version of sabnzbd (4.3.2) requires newer than the 8.1 we currently have.

Also remove both patches as they seem to no longer be required due to updates to yEnc module

Changelog(s) since last port:
https://github.com/sabnzbd/sabctools/releases/tag/v8.2.2
https://github.com/sabnzbd/sabctools/releases/tag/v8.2.1
https://github.com/sabnzbd/sabctools/releases/tag/v8.2.0
